Email (NettMail)

Merlin uses NettMail (nettsite/nettmail-laravel), a first-party Composer package, for all email sending. NettMail handles both transactional email (individual invoice emails triggered by user actions) and campaign email (bulk sends to contact lists). Its admin pages appear in the application navigation under the Emails group.

The NettMail integration

NettMail is installed as a pinned Composer package (nettsite/nettmail-laravel). The version should only be bumped deliberately — do not auto-update it. NettMail adds its own admin pages for template management, contacts, lists, segments, and campaigns; these pages render inside Merlin's own application layout because config/nettmail.php sets nettmail.layout to layout.app. NettMail routes are prefixed with the value of NETTMAIL_ROUTES_PREFIX (default: nettmail).

Transactional versus campaign email

Transactional email is one-to-one email triggered by a specific user action. In Merlin, the primary transactional email is the sales invoice email, sent when you click Send Invoice on an invoice. Transactional emails use the Unlayer template selected in Billing Settings and are sent immediately via the configured mail driver.

Campaign email is one-to-many email sent to a contact list or segment. NettMail's campaign features (Templates, Contacts, Lists, Segments, Campaigns) are managed through the Emails admin section. Campaign emails respect rate limits configured by NETTMAIL_SENDING_RATE_LIMIT (default: 60 sends per minute).

Invoice email templates

Sales invoice emails are rendered using Unlayer drag-and-drop templates rather than static Blade views. This lets non-technical users customise the look of invoice emails without touching code. The workflow is:

  1. Go to Emails › Templates and create or edit an Unlayer template for your invoice email.
  2. Go to Settings › Billing and select that template as the invoice email template.
  3. When you send a sales invoice, InvoiceEmailTemplateService renders the selected template with invoice merge tags and passes the resulting HTML to SalesInvoiceMail for delivery.

The Unlayer project ID is configured via NETTMAIL_UNLAYER_PROJECT_ID in .env.

Configuring mail delivery

NettMail supports multiple mail drivers. Set NETTMAIL_DRIVER to one of the following and configure the corresponding variables:

DriverEnvironment variables
php (default)NETTMAIL_PHP_COMMAND (default: /usr/sbin/sendmail -bs)
smtpNETTMAIL_SMTP_HOST, NETTMAIL_SMTP_PORT, NETTMAIL_SMTP_USERNAME, NETTMAIL_SMTP_PASSWORD, NETTMAIL_SMTP_ENCRYPTION
resendNETTMAIL_RESEND_API_KEY, NETTMAIL_RESEND_WEBHOOK_SECRET
mailersendNETTMAIL_MAILERSEND_API_KEY, NETTMAIL_MAILERSEND_WEBHOOK_SECRET
mailgunNETTMAIL_MAILGUN_API_KEY, NETTMAIL_MAILGUN_DOMAIN, NETTMAIL_MAILGUN_WEBHOOK_SECRET
postmarkNETTMAIL_POSTMARK_SERVER_TOKEN, NETTMAIL_POSTMARK_WEBHOOK_SECRET
sesNETTMAIL_SES_ACCESS_KEY_ID, NETTMAIL_SES_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, NETTMAIL_SES_REGION, NETTMAIL_SES_WEBHOOK_SECRET

Additionally set the sender identity:

NETTMAIL_FROM_NAME=Acme Plumbing
NETTMAIL_FROM_ADDRESS=invoices@acmeplumbing.example.com

The Emails admin section

The Emails navigation group provides access to NettMail's admin pages:

  • Templates — create and edit Unlayer email templates for invoices and campaigns
  • Contacts — manage the NettMail contact list (separate from Merlin's party contacts)
  • Lists — organise contacts into named lists for campaign targeting
  • Segments — define dynamic contact segments based on rules
  • Campaigns — create and send bulk email campaigns to lists or segments

NEEDS CONFIRMATION: exact route paths for NettMail admin pages (owned by the package, not Merlin).
